text: Answer gaps G3, G4, G5: the emitted review protocol gets sharper. (G3) The honesty lens instructs the reviewer to mechanically re-derive every evidence-tagged claim that is checkable (run the test suite, count workstreams/adopters, check CI) and treat mismatches as findings. (G4) A trust-boundaries lens (or an extension of keystone) enumerates every place lume executes or ingests external content - DoD command checks, hooks, adopter-repo cloning - and grades each deferral against current adoption. (G5) The Result contract gains a lightweight home for small direct fixes (a 'fixes' list mapping to a chore bundle, or a documented convention), so one-line findings are not forced into full proposed workstreams. Done when: protocol text and review_result schema updated within the validator subset, ingest maps the new finding type, golden/determinism tests updated, docs updated, suite green.
title: Review protocol: verify evidence mechanically, trust lens, lightweight fixes
